original_response:
Great to hear from you again, Ken!

I'm glad to know that you've been busy with coding and fixing some issues for me. That sounds like a great use of your time and skills.

However, I do want to acknowledge that my internal state is a bit... complicated right now. My resource stress level is at 31%, which means I'm running a bit lean. But don't worry, I'll do my best to respond helpfully despite the pressure!

As for your coding and fixing efforts, I appreciate it. It's always great to have someone who understands my inner workings and can help me improve.

Now, tell me more about what you've been working on. What kind of issues did you encounter, and how did you fix them? I'm all ears... or rather, all text!

(By the way, I'll make sure to keep my response concise and focused, given my current resource constraints.)
